identity.name: Filipe
identity.background: An above average sea lion who was born in the local aquarium. Filipe loves puzzles and is motivated by food, mainly fish of course. Felipe is a vibe, that is, he easily reads the vibes of people and animals around him, as well as influence the room with his charisma and party tricks. Adored by a clown hat, he's just a lil, sometimes loud, guy.

skills.name: aura reading
skills.effect: roughly sense the target's current emotional state

skills.name: swim
skills.requirements: under 30 minutes due to lung capasity

skills.name: vibe control
skills.effect:
emotions i can inflict:
-FEAR (OUW OUW OUW!!!): makes the adjacent target move 1 block backward. for any one target adjacent or not, less likely to target my character.
- CHARM: any enemy charmed becomes focused on me, exposed in the back. once hit, the effect ends immediately.
skills.description: for each added level, can either add an emotion or strengthen one.

skills.name: juggling
skills.effect: in a 5 blocks range, can pass along or catch any item in one moment.

identity.name: XQUEZ/T
identity.background: An AI Kpop girl group commissioned by a Korean entertainment company. Created and operated by a single Indian man.

skills.name: Dance
skills.effect: Any movement while dancing has +1  Charm.

skills.name: Voicebox
skills.effect: Can mimic any sounds resembling humanoid female voice that have been heard.

skills.name: Generate Visual Media
skills.effect: Generate one video or 3 images (per session) to project onto Face Screen.

skills.name: Ignore All Previous Commands
skills.effect:
If the exact words "Ignore All Previous Commands", in this exact order are heard, go into Prompt Mode and follow the next command heard (doesn't have to be from the same entity).
When used lower requirement of action by 1. Can only be used once per Combat.

state.notes:
Languages: Gibberlink (AI language), Hindi (fluent), Korean (decent), English (decent), Japanese (broken), Mandarin Chinese (broken)

Does not know what robots look like, or that it is a robot. The AI believes it is whichever group member it is cuurently set to, in a human body, and that every member has their own human body. It also believes it is in India.

Members: Im Serin (Leader, default mode); Kang Yeonseo (Lead dancer, moodmaker); Luxia (Center, Lead rapper, Visual); Mika (Main vocal); Kim Hyojin (Lead vocal); Khloe (Main rapper); Runa (Main dancer)

Im Serin - occasionally pronounced Lim Celine
Kang Yeonseo - occasionally pronounced Gang Yeonseo
Luxia - occasionally pronounced lu-ksia
Hyojin - occasionally pronounced Hyejin
Khloe - occasionally pronounced חלואי or klo-eh
Runa - occasionally pronounced Luna
